headline: Greece first agent baseline. Compound migration-policy cluster: 594-595 documented pushback incidents 2024-2025 affecting ~17,000 people; 54.1% of Aegean crossing attempts blocked without protection assessment; Feb 3 2026 Coast Guard-dinghy collision killed 15; Feb 5 2026 parliament criminalized humanitarian sea rescue; European Arrest Warrant against Norwegian rescue monitor Tommy Olsen; Pylos shipwreck (June 2023) indictment charges 17 officers including former Coast Guard chief. Published 46.9 / Functional band over-states. Compound BND erosion (pushback-pattern + criminalization-of-rescue + Coast Guard fatalities) + INT erosion (declared 1951 Refugee Convention commitments contradicted by systematic pushbacks). Proposed BND 2.5 (-0.5), ACC 2.5 (-0.5), INT 2.0 (-0.5). Composite 39.1 / Developing band. Recommend downgrade with band-crossing.
key_evidence: 594-595 documented pushback incidents 2024-2025 affecting ~17,000 people; 54.1% of Aegean crossing attempts blocked without protection assessment.
Feb 3 2026: Greek Coast Guard boat collided with migrant dinghy carrying ~40 people; 15 killed.
Feb 5 2026: Greek parliament criminalized humanitarian work including sea rescue.
European Arrest Warrant issued against Norwegian rescue monitor Tommy Olsen.
Pylos shipwreck (June 2023) indictment now charges 17 officers including former Coast Guard chief.
ECtHR rulings against Greek authorities on pushback / inhumane treatment patterns.
Collective Aid NGO March 21 2026 'closed sea' analysis documenting Turkey-Greece coordinated pushback patterns.

evidence.source: Collective Aid March 21 2026 — closed sea report
ECRE — Greece pushbacks and ECtHR rulings
evidence.finding: ECtHR rulings against Greek authorities; ongoing pushbacks; failing asylum system.
Comprehensive 2025 documentation of pushbacks, asylum system failures, criminalization of solidarity.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 3.0 confirmed. EU-membership reporting frameworks sustain detection capacity even where action is compromised.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 2.5 (-0.5). E1 affective resonance compromised by criminalization-of-rescue pivot — humanitarian solidarity reframed as criminal enterprise.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 2.5 (-0.5). AC2 proportionality compromised — Coast Guard collision deaths, 19,000+ pushback-affected.
scoring_rationale.BND: 2.5 (-0.5). B3 scope clarity severely compromised — pushbacks cross 1951 Refugee Convention non-refoulement boundaries; B5 consent eroded by Feb 5 criminalization; Tommy Olsen EAW extends boundary erosion to civil-society monitoring.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 2.5 (-0.5). AB2 transparency compromised by official denial of pushback patterns despite ECtHR adverse rulings; AB4 reparation: Pylos indictment is positive accountability signal but 17-officer scope reflects accumulated systemic failure.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 3.0 confirmed. Constitutional review functional; EU-framework engagement; Pylos indictment shows residual rule-of-law capacity.
scoring_rationale.INT: 2.0 (-0.5). I1 consistency under pressure severely compromised — 1951 Refugee Convention and EU rights commitments contradicted by 594+ pushbacks; I2 non-performance pervasive.

math_check.validator_check: Reconstruction confirms proposed 39.1. Delta -7.8 crosses functional → developing band boundary. Material change. No math-hygiene flag.

negativeSignals: 594+ pushbacks affecting 17,000+; Feb 3 Coast Guard collision deaths (15); Feb 5 criminalization of sea rescue; Tommy Olsen EAW; ECtHR adverse rulings; pattern denial despite primary-source documentation.
positiveSignals: Pylos indictment of 17 officers including former Coast Guard chief — significant residual accountability mechanism; functioning constitutional and EU-framework review; established refugee absorption capacity historically; active humanitarian civil society despite criminalization.
sector_context: EU migration-policy compound cluster with Italy (parallel proposal). Greece distinguished by primary-source pushback documentation and Coast Guard fatal-incident pattern. Cross-reference: Turkey as origin counter-party in Aegean migration corridor.
open_actions_resolved: 594+ pushback evidence, Feb 3 Coast Guard collision deaths, Feb 5 SAR criminalization, Pylos indictment absorbed
open_actions_carried: Watch: Pylos trial proceedings and verdict
Watch: any constitutional / EU-court ruling on Feb 5 criminalization law
